description: Discussion on the evolution of multi-chain technology and interoperability in blockchain, featuring insights from industry leaders on cross-chain solutions and challenges.
topic_summary: Panelists discuss the future of multi-chain ecosystems, focusing on Solana's role and interoperability solutions like RENVM and Floating Point Group. Key topics include cross-chain transfers, Ethereum compatibility, and liquidity in the Solana ecosystem [t=23:12-371:02].
